rule_metadata.name: ft_swf_cws
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for regular compressed SWF files

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_swf_cws
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150318"
		desc = "File type signature for regular compressed SWF files"

	strings:
		$cws = "CWS"

	condition:
		$cws at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_swf_fws
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for basic SWF files.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_swf_fws
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150318"
		desc = "File type signature for basic SWF files."

	strings:
		$fws = "FWS"

	condition:
		$fws at 0
}

rule_metadata.name: ft_swf_zws
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: File type signature for SWF files compressed with LZMA compression, uncommonly observed

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_swf_zws
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20150318"
		desc = "File type signature for SWF files compressed with LZMA compression, uncommonly observed"

	strings:
		$zws = "ZWS"

	condition:
		$zws at 0
}
